mapper.select:
SELECT VNGL.GATE_CD , CVUR.USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(CVUR.GATE_CD, CVUR.USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS USER_NM , CVUR.DEPT_CD , CVUR.DEPT_NM , CVUR.TEL_NUM AS TEL_NUM , CVUR.CELL_NUM AS CELL_NUM , CVUR.EMAIL AS EMAIL , CVUR.POSITION_NM , CVUR.SMS_FLAG , GETCOMCODE(CVUR.GATE_CD, 'M044', CVUR.SMS_FLAG, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS SMS_FLAG_NM , CVUR.MAIL_FLAG , GETCOMCODE(CVUR.GATE_CD, 'M044', CVUR.MAIL_FLAG, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS MAIL_FLAG_NM , CVUR.MNG_YN , GETCOMCODE(CVUR.GATE_CD, 'M044', CVUR.MNG_YN, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS MNG_YN_NM , CVUR.BLOCK_FLAG , GETCOMCODE(CVUR.GATE_CD, 'M044', CVUR.BLOCK_FLAG, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS BLOCK_FLAG_NM , (CVUR.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM STOCVNGL VNGL LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE VNGL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND UPPER(VNGL.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(VNGL.GATE_CD, VNGL.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(CVUR.USER_ID) like '%' UPPER(#{USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(CVUR.GATE_CD, CVUR.USER_ID , #{ses.langCd})) like '%' UPPER(#{USER_NM}) '%'
AND CVUR.REG_DATE >= (#{REG_FROM_DATE})
AND CVUR.REG_DATE <= (#{REG_TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(CVUR.DEPT_NM) like '%' UPPER(#{DEPT_NM}) '%'
AND CVUR.BLOCK_FLAG = #{BLOCK_FLAG}

SELECT VNGL.GATE_CD , CVUR.COMPANY_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(CVUR.GATE_CD, CVUR.COMPANY_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS COMPANY_NM , CVUR.USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(CVUR.GATE_CD, CVUR.USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS USER_NM , CVUR.DEPT_CD , CVUR.DEPT_NM , CVUR.MNG_YN , GETCOMCODE(CVUR.GATE_CD, 'M044', CVUR.MNG_YN, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS MNG_YN_NM , CVUR.POSITION_NM , CVUR.DUTY_NM , CVUR.TEL_NUM AS TEL_NUM , CVUR.FAX_NUM AS FAX_NUM , CVUR.ZIP_CD AS ZIP_CD , CVUR.ADDR_1 AS ADDR_1 , CVUR.ADDR_2 AS ADDR_2 , CVUR.CELL_NUM AS CELL_NUM , CVUR.EMAIL AS EMAIL , CVUR.SMS_FLAG , GETCOMCODE(CVUR.GATE_CD, 'M044', CVUR.SMS_FLAG, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS SMS_FLAG_NM , CVUR.MAIL_FLAG , GETCOMCODE(CVUR.GATE_CD, 'M044', CVUR.MAIL_FLAG, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS MAIL_FLAG_NM , CVUR.VNGL_ROLE , CVUR.BLOCK_FLAG , CVUR.BLOCK_REASON FROM STOCVNGL VNGL LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD AND CVUR.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE VNGL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CVUR.USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
